# canvas-cli

> 50+ commands for Canvas LMS — courses, assignments, submissions, grading, and more.

## Overview

50+ commands for Canvas LMS — courses, assignments, submissions, grading, and more.

## Key features

- Full Canvas LMS API coverage — courses, assignments, submissions, enrollments
- JSON output on all commands via --json
- Safety gates — --dry-run, --confirm on mutations
- OAuth2 authentication
- Single Go binary, no runtime dependencies

## Documentation

- Authentication: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/canvas-cli/docs/auth
- Command Reference: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/canvas-cli/docs/command-spec
- JSON Contract: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/canvas-cli/docs/json-contract
- Safety Model: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/canvas-cli/docs/safety-model
- Architecture: https://thedavidweng.github.io/site/canvas-cli/docs/architecture
